eligible_applicant_type: Town or county government in Maine
project_area: Intergenerational community building projects focused on social bonds, community wellbeing, knowledge preservation, and sustainable community models
demographic_requirements: Projects must involve older adults and younger generations, with a focus on reducing social isolation and fostering mutual understanding and lifelong learning.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include 501(c)(3) nonprofits in Maine, town or county governments in Maine, Wabanaki tribal governments, and Maine schools or school systems. Collaboration between organizations is encouraged, and applicants must not have received a Permanent Commission grant in the last six months unless partnering with a new entity.
